changelog: Compatibility: targets Jellyfin 12.0.0.0 beta with plugin version 1.8.0.0. Localization: adds a global interface language setting with Same as Jellyfin, English, and French, localizes the admin page, visible API messages, and scheduled task names/descriptions while keeping task keys stable. Interface: keeps all pool management, language filtering, security, pagination, and rotation controls from 1.7.0.0. Packaging: includes a local plugin image for manual zip installs.
description: Fill a local poster pool per movie from providers, then periodically rotate the Primary Poster image from the pool. This keeps Jellyfin looking fresh with rotating poster images on an interval of your choosing.
name: Poster Rotator
